## Submission checklist

- [ ] My folder is `submissions/{my_model_name}/` (lowercase, alphanumeric, hyphens/underscores only)
- [ ] I've included **all 9 files** (3 settings × 3 targets) for my val_strategy
- [ ] Filenames follow `{setting}_{target}_{model_name}_val_{val_strategy}.csv`
- [ ] The `model` column inside each CSV matches my model name exactly
- [ ] I have **not** modified any files outside `submissions/`
